name: Orange Roughy with Champagne Sauce
recipeInstructions:
or use any firm white-fleshed fish
Sprinkle the soy sauce, chile powder, salt, garlic and red pepper over both sides of the fish. Spray the inside of a large skillet with cooking spray and place over high heat. Add the fish and cook for 4 minutes per side, turning often to prevent burning. Transfer the fish to a platter and keep warm. Spray the skillet again with cooking spray and place over high heat. Add the mushrooms, onion and bell peppers; cook, stirring, for 5 minutes. Remove from the heat and spoon on top of the fish. To the same skillet, add the broth and champagne. Cook for 5 minutes, or until the liquid is reduced by half; spoon over the fish.
